benchmark_spec.prompt_template: Summarize the key engineering tradeoffs of deploying a quantized language model under a fixed GPU memory budget. Focus on accuracy, memory footprint, and inference latency, and explain why a practitioner might choose extra bits or low-rank repair for a single-device deployment setting.

{
  "run_id": "G2R02_Q17B",
  "phase": "qwen3_1p7b_gptq_transfer",
  "description": "Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B-Base GPTQ-backed targeted-rank allocator using activation-space sensitivity at +1.0% of R3_Q17B memory.",
  "model": {
    "name": "Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B-Base",
    "tokenizer_name": "Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B-Base",
    "dtype_preference": [
      "float16"
    ]
  },
  "method": {
    "name": "targeted_svd_rank",
    "base_run_id": "R3_Q17B",
    "base_method": "gptq",
    "implementation": "transformers_gptq_config",
    "base_bit_width": 4,
    "group_size": 128,
    "symmetric": true,
    "target_granularity": "matrix",
    "allocator": "greedy_activation",
    "proxy_family": "activation",
    "candidate_pool_path": "configs/scaleup_1p7b_gptq/qwen3_1p7b_gptq_top12_candidate_pool.json",
    "budget_percent_of_base": 1.0,
    "budget_reference_metric": "memory_total_bytes",
    "candidate_ranks": [
      4,
      8,
      16,
      32
    ],
    "factor_dtype_bytes": 2,
    "desc_act": true,
    "act_group_aware": false,
    "true_sequential": true,
    "batch_size": 1,
    "validate_outputs": true,
    "non_finite_check_batches": 1,
    "selection_profile_source": "current_base_model"
  },
  "calibration": {
    "dataset": "wikitext",
    "subset": "wikitext-2-raw-v1",
    "split": "train",
    "num_sequences": 128,
    "sequence_length": 512,
    "sampling": "seeded_shuffle",
    "seed": 42
  },
  "evaluation": {
    "dataset": "wikitext",
    "subset": "wikitext-2-raw-v1",
    "split": "test",
    "sequence_length": 512,
    "stride": 512,
    "metrics": [
      "perplexity",
      "latency_ms_per_token",
      "memory_total_bytes",
      "allocation_actions"
    ]
  },
  "profiling": {
    "layerwise_weight_error": true,
    "layerwise_activation_error": false,
    "residual_svd_profile": false,
    "profile_sequence_length": 128,
    "profile_num_sequences": 8
  },
  "outputs": {
    "results_dir": "/resultsvol/results/modal_latency/qwen3_1p7b_gptq_transfer/G2R02_Q17B__bs8",
    "metrics_file": "metrics.json",
    "layer_summary_file": "layer_errors.json",
    "residual_profile_file": "residual_profiles.json"
  }
}
